general_feedback: All filled-in @param and @return descriptions are accurate, concise, and consistent with the surrounding Scaladoc conventions in this file. The `_loadFactor` description aligns with the existing `(in 0.001 step)` terminology used elsewhere in the object. Return descriptions for the nullable `Entry | Null` methods (`findEntry`, `findOrAddEntry`, `removeEntry`, `removeEntry0`) correctly document the null cases. The `index`, `improve`, and `nextPositivePowerOfTwo` returns accurately describe the produced values and constraints. Backticks are used appropriately for code references, all descriptions begin with lowercase, and length is well-calibrated.
